introduction:
Delhi’s Transport Department has fully digitized licensing. The journey starts with a Learner's Licence (LL) and completes with a Permanent Driving Licence (DL).

Delhi mandates Faceless LL applications, enabling residents to give their test securely via AI-proctored online platforms from their homes.
quickFacts:
Crucial Path
  • LL Test: Online only. Aadhaar eKYC is mandatory.
  • DL Test: Conducted strictly on Automated Driving Test Tracks (ADTT).
  • Must apply for DL between 30 and 180 days from the date of LL issuance.
documentsRequired:
Documents Required

For Learner's Licence (LL)
  • Aadhaar Card with linked Mobile Number
  • Age Proof
  • Address Proof (If Aadhaar not used, Faceless is not possible)
  • Form 1 Digital Declaration
For Permanent DL
  • Printed Learner's Licence
  • Application Form 4 receipt
  • Valid vehicle RC, Insurance for test vehicle
  • Fee Payment Receipt
onlineApplication:
How to Apply Online

Stage 1: e-Learner's Licence
  1. Visit sarathi.parivahan.gov.in and select Delhi.
  2. Select "Apply for Learner Licence" via Aadhaar e-KYC.
  3. Complete the profile, upload digital documents, and pay the fee online.
  4. Take the traffic rules exam online using a webcam. AI monitors the test. Upon passing, download the e-LL instantly.
Stage 2: Permanent DL
  1. After 30 days, select "Apply for Driving Licence" from the Parivahan portal.
  2. Fill the application using your e-LL number.
  3. Pay the DL fee.
  4. Select your preferred Automated Driving Test Track (ADTT) (e.g., Lado Sarai, Burari) and book the slot.
offlineApplication:
How to Apply Offline / Driving Test

Delhi does not allow manual counter applications. The only offline action is your physical test:

  1. Report to the ADTT 15 minutes before exactly. Driving tests are rigorously sensor-driven in Delhi.
  2. Maneuver your vehicle through S-curves, gradients, and parking hurdles. Performance is captured via CCTV loops and sensors.
  3. A real-time pass/fail notification is generated without manual intervention.
afterApplying: Once Approved: Delhi utilizes centralized printing. Your PVC Smart Card will be dispatched to your home address via Speed Post within 7-10 working days.
helpfulLinks: MoRTH Sarathi Portal Delhi Transport Dept
